name: Knight
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Brave","desc":"The knight has advantage on saving throws against being frightened."}]

### Actions
[{"name":"Multiattack","desc":"The knight makes two melee attacks."},{"name":"Greatsword","desc":"Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage."},{"name":"Heavy Crossbow","desc":"Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d10) piercing damage."},{"name":"Leadership","desc":"For 1 minute, the knight can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 ft. of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a d4 to its roll provided it can hear and understand the knight. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the knight is incapacitated."}]
